displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone #3
synopsis: Jedi Master and expert investigator Emerick Caphtor seeks the true nature of the Nameless! To help him solve the mystery of the “Force Eaters,” Emerick has brought on a Nihil prisoner-of-war with knowledge of the creatures. Together, the unlikely duo crosses the volcanic landscape of a distant moon in search of answers. Will the Jedi’s travelling companion prove to be a liability or an asset on this treacherous journey? • Four issue series
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone #3
